  -o, --output           Build the file system out of the added files and
                         directories

  --no-zstd              Do not compress chunks with zstd

  --no-hash              Do not hash meta data and chunks for read-time
                         verification

  --compression-level    (Default: 22) Zstd compression level

  --dict-size            Zstd compression dict size (if 0, 100 * average of
                         sample data is used

  --fastcdc-min          (Default: 32768) Minimum chunk size for FastCDC
                         algorithm

  --fastcdc-avg          (Default: 65536) Average chunk size for FastCDC
                         algorithm

  --fastcdc-max          (Default: 262144) Maximum chunk size for FastCDC
                         algorithm

  -f, --file             Adds or extract given file to or from the file system

  -d, --directory        Adds or extract given directory to or from the file
                         system

  -t, --target           Target path of the file or directory within the file
                         system or for extraction

  -r, --recursive        Adds or extracts the directory recursively to or from
                         the file system

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.
